news.headline: SSV Network's Alan Fork boosts Mainnet performance, cutting CPU usage and enhancing scalability, per SSV Team.
news.summary: A new update named Alan Fork on the SSV Network has resulted in significant enhancements in performance metrics. The update has successfully decreased CPU usage and resource consumption, while also improving node efficiency and scalability. This development signifies a positive impact on the network's operations, ushering in a new era of improved functionality.

news.headline: Elon Musk in the news: Tesla payout denied, SpaceX valuation revealed. #ElonMusk #Tesla #SpaceX
Increase in maximum BFUSD holdings for VIP 0-9 users on Binance Futures starting Dec. 3, 2024. Individual accounts must comply with new trading rules.
news.summary: Starting from December 3, 2024, Binance Futures has raised the BFUSD maximum holding limits for VIP 0 to 9 users. The adjustment impacts individual accounts and mandates adherence to the revised trading regulations.

news.headline: Binance adds USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts to its Futures Copy Trading for users to mirror top traders. Enhances trading options.
news.summary: Binance has recently added USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts to its Futures Copy Trading platform. This update aims to provide more trading options for users interested in mimicking the strategies of successful traders. This addition increases the range of opportunities available for users on the platform.

news.headline: Gartner lists top priorities for CMOs in 2025: bridging strategy with operations, delivering differentiation, and investing in customer journey.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, Gartner, Inc. has outlined three key priorities for Chief Marketing Officers (CMOs) in order to achieve marketing excellence by 2025. These priorities involve: 1) bridging the disconnect between marketing strategy and operations to adapt to disruptions; 2) leading marketing initiatives to create distinctive value across the enterprise; and 3) focusing on customer journey investments to enhance marketing effectiveness. These strategies aim to assist CMOs in navigating the evolving business landscape and driving growth.

news.headline: Hydrogen CEO Hill and UMass expert Niezrecki discuss hydrogen-wind energy synergy and resilience in wind systems.
news.summary: Dr. Christopher Niezrecki provides insights on monitoring the structural health of wind energy systems for enhancing energy resilience.

news.headline: Kitron ASA to present at a Capital Markets Presentation in Oslo on Dec 10, 2024, discussing strategic and financial goals.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Kitron ASA is set to hold a Capital Markets Presentation in Oslo, Norway. The event aims to offer insights into the company's strategic and financial goals. Attendees will have the opportunity to learn about Kitron ASA's plans and advancements.

news.headline: Toesca Asset Management and Astarte Capital Partners partner to launch $350M Regenerative Agriculture Investment Platform in Latin America.
news.summary: A strategic partnership has been formed between Toesca Asset Management and Astarte Capital Partners in London. They are launching a regenerative agriculture investment platform focusing on Latin America with a total investment of $350 million.

news.headline: Dunhuang in Gansu Province joins winter tourism battle with discounts and visa-free entry, attracting global travelers.
news.summary: With the onset of winter, popular tourist spots in Northeast China are gearing up to receive tourists. In a surprising move, Dunhuang in Gansu Province, Northwest China, has also entered the competition to lure global travelers. This city, situated in the UNESCO World Heritage site, is set to attract a significant number of visitors this year.

news.headline: Global Risk Map 2025 reveals heightened dangers worldwide but shows improved safety in some countries. Helpful tool for travelers.
news.summary: In Lund, Sweden, on December 3, 2024, concerns about travel safety are on the rise as the new year looms. Safeture and Riskline have collaborated to create Risk Map 2025, a comprehensive tool providing travelers with a thorough and interactive assessment of global travel risks. This platform aims to assist individuals in making informed decisions about their destinations as they navigate potential hazards.

news.headline: ASSA ABLOY buys 9Solutions, a Finland-based healthcare provider, known for AI-powered senior care solutions.
news.summary: In Stockholm on December 3, 2024, ASSA ABLOY announced the acquisition of 9Solutions, a Finnish company specializing in AI-powered real-time locating healthcare solutions for critical communication. The acquisition focuses on senior care and aims to enhance collaboration. This deal will bolster ASSA ABLOY's capabilities and further solidify their position in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: IRIS Software Group to acquire Dext Software Ltd to enhance solutions globally - Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: A major acquisition has been completed in London on December 3, 2024, where IRIS Software Group has acquired a significant entity. This move aims to establish a comprehensive solution that caters to the needs of accountants and businesses on a global scale. The acquisition is expected to enhance partner collaborations, pushing for seamless integrations, and fueling advancements in product development. IRIS Software Group is renowned for its offerings in accountancy, education management, and HR services. The integration is set to bring about widespread changes and innovations in the sector, impacting numerous stakeholders.

news.headline: Skanska to construct tram depot in Helsinki, Finland for EUR 252M (SEK 2.9 billion) with City Transport Ltd.
news.summary: Skanska, based in Stockholm, announced on December 3, 2024, that they secured a EUR 252 million contract (approximately SEK 2.9 billion) with City Transport Ltd to construct a tram depot in Helsinki, Finland. The deal will contribute to Skanska's Nordic order bookings for the fourth quarter of 2024. This development marks a significant project for the company in the infrastructure sector.

news.headline: Sobi to showcase haematology strength at ASH 2024 with new data, partners, 66th annual meeting in San Diego from 7th - 10th December.
news.summary: In December 2024, Sobi® and its collaborators are set to unveil innovative findings at the 66th Annual Meeting of the American Society of Hematology (ASH) in San Diego, California. Scheduled from the 7th to the 10th, various analyses will be showcased during the event.

news.headline: Cirql™ introduces Cirql Zero™, industrially compostable material for footwear, available to brands in Jan 2025.
news.summary: Cirql™, an innovation company based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, has announced the debut of Cirql Zero™ at ISPO. Starting in January 2025, this new technology will be offered to footwear brands. Cirql™ specializes in creating scalable and environmentally friendly finished midsole components and materials.

news.headline: Moon Creative Lab and Rip Curl win ISPO 2024 award for Variloom™ 3DP Filament and Print System, hailed for Mirage3DP Boardshort innovation.
news.summary: Moon Creative Lab's Variloom 3DP Filament and Print System has been acknowledged as a crucial component in Rip Curl's Mirage3DP Boardshort, lauded for pioneering sustainable and functional design. The collaboration between Moon Creative Lab and Rip Curl was announced on December 3, 2024, in Munich, Germany, Palo Alto, California, and Tokyo. This innovation integrates cutting-edge technology to produce environmentally friendly products.

news.headline: TeamViewer introduces Smart Service to reduce downtime & tackle workforce gaps for OEMs, enhancing after-sales support.
news.summary: In GÖPPINGEN, Germany on December 3, 2024, a prominent company in remote connectivity and digital workplace solutions, TeamViewer, unveiled TeamViewer Smart Service. This new offering is tailored for post-sales assistance to aid machinery and equipment manufacturers optimize their operations.

news.headline: Orion Innovation and Royal Belgian Football Association team up for Project Fenix to transform Belgian football digitally.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Orion Innovation, a renowned company providing digital transformation and product development services worldwide, and the Royal Belgian Football Association (RBFA). Together, they are working on Project Fenix, a groundbreaking initiative aimed at transforming Belgian...

news.headline: Education Cannot Wait and Special Olympics International partner to promote inclusion for children with intellectual disabilities in crises.
news.summary: A new partnership has been established to tackle obstacles encountered by children with intellectual disabilities in some of the toughest crises globally. The initiative, launched in New York on December 3, 2024, aims to promote inclusion through sports for these children. This groundbreaking collaboration will focus on providing support and resources to address the challenges faced by an estimated X number of children with intellectual disabilities in crisis-affected areas. The partnership's efforts are geared towards creating a more inclusive environment to enhance the well-being and opportunities for these vulnerable children.

news.headline: Demi Lovato collaborates with PlanetPlay for 'Make Green Tuesday Moves' campaign, merging music, gaming, and sustainability.
news.summary: A renowned worldwide artist collaborates with PlanetPlay's innovative 'Make Green Tuesday Moves' campaign, bringing together music, gaming, and environmental consciousness. The initiative aims to motivate fans globally to support sustainability efforts. The partnership was announced in London on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Upgrade your living room with Toshiba TV deals this holiday season. Grab Black Friday offers for a refreshed home environment.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 3, 2024, Toshiba TV is encouraging families to take advantage of the holiday season by upgrading their televisions for cozy family gatherings. With Black Friday deals on the horizon, Toshiba is offering the best discounts for families to enhance their home environment.

news.headline: France is on the brink of a crisis as numbers surge, impacting the country's economy significantly.
Epson's TrueOrder™ KDS now on Elo hardware, enhancing kitchen management for customers.
news.summary: A recent collaboration between Epson and Elo has introduced an innovative Kitchen Display System (KDS) called TrueOrder™ to customers. This partnership includes the integration of TrueOrder™ onto specific hardware from Elo, a globally recognized company. The news was made public in Los Alamitos, Calif., on December 3, 2024. This technology aims to offer advanced kitchen management solutions to users, enhancing efficiency in restaurant operations.

news.headline: Kia America achieves best November sales ever - 20% increase over 2023, with record sales for Telluride SUV and electrified vehicles.
news.summary: Kia achieved a significant milestone in November with a 20% increase in sales compared to the previous year, setting a new record high for the month in company history. The Telluride SUV also experienced its best-ever month in terms of sales. Additionally, November was the best month for Kia's utility and electrified vehicle lineup. The sales figures point to a successful month for Kia, with particular strengths in these key areas. These accomplishments were announced from Kia's headquarters in Irvine, California in a press release on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: AC Health and USAID work to improve HIV care accessibility in Philippines, fighting epidemic by providing stigma-free services.
news.summary: In the Philippines, as of December 3, 2024, Ayala Healthcare Holdings, Inc. (AC Health) has joined forces with the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) to spearhead the private sector's campaign against the HIV crisis. Their focus is on enhancing access to stigma-free services.

news.headline: XRP price trading in historical sell-off zone, previous crashes of 85-95%, traders anticipating new all-time highs.
news.summary: The current price of XRP is situated within a zone historically associated with significant sell-offs prior to 85-95% declines. Despite this pattern, traders are optimistic and aiming for new all-time highs and potentially even greater gains.

news.headline: GROW with SAP on AWS launched to simplify ERP deployment. Customers can now deploy SAP's ERP solution on AWS for reliability and scalability.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, during AWS re:Invent, Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS) and SAP SE introduced GROW with SAP on AWS. This collaboration aims to facilitate the quick deployment of SAP's ERP solution for customers of all sizes. By utilizing the reliability, security, and scalability of the highly embraced cloud service, this initiative will streamline the adoption of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) and SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) joined forces to offer this service, which is set to provide a seamless experience for businesses transitioning to SAP solutions.

news.headline: S&P 500 sector outlook: RBC raises US communication services to overweight from market weight.
SimScale and Hexagon team up to offer nonlinear structural analysis via SaaS, aiming to revolutionize engineering deployments.
news.summary: In Munich, SimScale GmbH and Hexagon’s Manufacturing Intelligence division have revealed a new partnership to revolutionize the deployment of advanced structural analysis for engineering teams. This collaboration aims to overcome accessibility challenges through providing Hexagon’s Marc nonlinear finite element solver as Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) on SimScale’s user-friendly cloud native platform. The strategic partnership seeks to unblock barriers and facilitate the utilization of cutting-edge capabilities, thereby reshaping engineering processes.

news.headline: Thales launches Data Risk Intelligence, combining Imperva Data Security Fabric and Thales CipherTrust Data Security Platform.
news.summary: Thales has introduced a new Data Risk Intelligence solution in partnership with Imperva, aiming to combat data risks across all locations. This innovative solution merges the risk and threat identification features of the Imperva Data Security Fabric with the data protection functions of the Thales CipherTrust Data Security Platform. The collaboration follows Thales' acquisition of Imperva in December 2023, marking a significant step in enhancing data security measures.

news.headline: KYOCERA to showcase latest innovations at CES 2025 in Las Vegas, including AI and wireless tech. President Hideo Tanimoto.
news.summary: Kyocera Corporation, under President Hideo Tanimoto, revealed its participation in CES 2025, a significant tech trade show in Las Vegas, USA, happening from January 7 to 10, 2025. The company's theme, "Technology Advancing Mobility, for Engineers Driving the World Forward," will showcase high-definition aerial displays, AI ranging cameras, and underwater optical wireless communications. This move highlights Kyocera's focus on innovative technologies at global events.

news.headline: Deliverect acquires Tabesto for smart kiosk tech to boost in-store sales. 60 new employees join.
news.summary: In London, Deliverect, a prominent food tech SaaS firm, revealed the acquisition of Tabesto, the innovative all-in-one platform for restaurant and fast-food ordering and payment kiosk. This strategic move allows Deliverect's clients to enhance their online order management and boost in-store services through Tabesto's advanced technology. The acquisition involves the addition of 60 new employees to Deliverect's workforce, including Guillaume Hour.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest - AUD, GBP, CAD, EUR, USD, NZD, CHF, JPY - Weakest
Sampo donates a significant amount to the Red Cross for Christmas.
Pacific Green buys land in Wagga Wagga, NSW to set up new energy park, expanding presence in Australia.
news.summary: In Sydney on December 3, 2024, Pacific Green, an international battery energy storage firm, announced the acquisition of land in Wagga Wagga, New South Wales. This location will be utilized for setting up their upcoming Australian energy park.

news.headline: Adara Ventures invests in SatVu, a thermal imaging startup, as part of £20M funding round for high-resolution satellite monitoring.
news.summary: Madrid-based Adara Ventures has disclosed its financial backing of SatVu, a pioneering company in advanced thermal imaging technology. This move signifies the inaugural investment from Adara Ventures Energy Fund. Co-leading the funding round with existing investors, the European venture capital firm contributed to the £20 million raised. SatVu utilizes its exclusive infrared technology to acquire the most precise thermal data globally, enabling monitoring capabilities from satellites in low orbit. This investment is expected to accelerate SatVu's growth and innovation.

news.headline: LINK token rises by 29%, named the genuine ‘bank coin’ by community. “XRP is a banker-themed memecoin,” noted Zach Rynes.
news.summary: Famous as "ChainkLinkGod," Zach Rynes stated that XRP, a cryptocurrency, is akin to a "memecoin" for bankers that did not gain enough popularity.

news.headline: Tivoli sees surge in revenue following record-breaking Halloween, predicts profit before tax of DKK 150 million for 2024. Joyful Christmas season anticipated.
news.summary: Tivoli's 2024 Christmas season kicked off on November 15th and has seen a strong turnout from visitors both local and international. The Christmas market at Tivoli has been recognized as one of the world's most exquisite. The park is anticipating a remarkable end to 2024, which holds special significance for Tivoli. The Halloween season concluded with record-breaking earnings, leading Tivoli to raise its financial outlook for the year. Initially expecting a revenue of DKK 1,250 million and pre-tax profit of DKK 130 million, Tivoli has upped its projections to revenue around DKK 1,300 million and pre-tax profit of around DKK 150 million for 2024. With robust visitor numbers and spending, Tivoli expects a historically high profit. CEO Susanne Mørch Koch anticipates a festive Christmas season until January 5th.

news.headline: Spar Nord Bank initiated a share buyback programme of up to DKK 500 million on 12 February 2024.
news.summary: Spar Nord's announcement number 10 for the year 2024 revealed a share repurchase plan amounting to a maximum of DKK 500 million. The buyback program commenced on February 12, 2024.

news.headline: Primary insiders traded in IDEX Biometrics ASA following EGM approval on 9 Oct 2024, with subscriptions on 28 Nov and 2 Dec.
news.summary: An upcoming offering in IDEX Biometrics ASA was approved during the Extraordinary General Meeting on October 9, 2024. Notifications were sent out regarding primary insiders' subscriptions on November 28 and December 2 of the same year.

news.headline: Approximately 88% of TO8 warrants exercised, Terranet to receive around SEK 17.2 million.
news.summary: Today, Terranet AB (publ) reported that 122,708,719 warrants of series TO8, around 88% of the total, were exercised for the subscription of an equal number of Class B shares at SEK 0.14 per share. This exercise is set to generate approximately SEK 17.2 million for Terranet before accounting for issue expenses.

news.headline: Virbac acquired Turkish company Mopsan for petfood & animal health product distribution on Dec 2.
news.summary: We completed the acquisition of Mopsan, a Turkish company, on December 2. Mopsan is known for distributing pet food and companion animal health products.

news.headline: Don't miss Haslinda Amin's insight on Bloomberg 12/03/2024! Tune in for some valuable information.
Nasdaq survey finds 35% firms turning to AI for compliance; hiring more data scientists. Regulatory tech key to adaptation.
news.summary: Nasdaq released its ninth Annual Global Compliance Survey, which included insights from 94 compliance professionals in the financial services industry. The survey revealed that 35% of respondents identified advanced technologies and AI as the main influences on their near-term compliance efforts. Firms are adapting to changing environments by hiring more data scientists and specialists. Technologies like AI and cloud are seen as tools that can enhance strategic insights and improve efficiency in handling regulatory compliance challenges. 35% of respondents expect AI to be the biggest driver of compliance process change in the next year. The financial industry is facing increasing regulatory requirements, financial crime, and operational challenges, prompting a focus on AI, cloud, and data quality.

news.headline: Swiss CPI YoY Actual 0.7% (Forecast 0.7%, Previous 0.6%)
Swiss Core CPI YoY Actual 0.9% (Forecast 0.9%, Previous 0.8%)
Swiss CPI MoM Actual -0.1% (Forecast -0.1%, Previous -0.1%)
Honeywell cuts 2024 outlook, Core & Main expected to report earnings at 65 cents per share on $1.99 billion revenue.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures showed a slight increase, drawing attention to certain stocks for investors. Before the opening bell, Core & Main, Inc. (NYSE:CNM) is expected to reveal quarterly earnings of 65 cents per share with revenue hitting $1.99 billion. In after-hours trading, Core & Main shares climbed by 0.04% to $48.31. Additionally, Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) recently entered a strategic agreement with Bombardier but adjusted its 2024 outlook, reducing the previously expected full-year revenue range of $38.6 billion-$38.8 billion. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Core & Main (NYSE: CNM) to release Q3 earnings on Dec 3, expected at 66 cents/share, revenue projected at $1.99 billion.
news.summary: Core & Main, Inc. (NYSE: CNM) is set to disclose its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, Dec. 3. Analysts anticipate earnings to reach 66 cents per share, up from last year's 52 cents per share. The Missouri-based company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.99 billion, compared to $1.83 billion a year ago. Additionally, Core & Main recently completed the acquisition of assets from ARGCO Northeast LLC. Following this news, Core & Main's shares closed at $48.29 on Monday, marking a 0.5% decrease. For further details, including analyst ratings, refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: S&P, Nasdaq hit record highs, Fear Index in 'Greed' zone. Tesla up 3.5%, SMCI surges 29%. Dow gained 7.5% in Nov.
news.summary: The market sentiment declined slightly as per the latest CNN Money Fear and Greed index report, although it remained in the “Greed” territory on Monday. U.S. stocks closed higher on the same day, witnessing notable upsurges with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite reaching new highs. Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) observed a 3.5% increase after being upgraded from Neutral to Buy by Roth MKM, which also raised the price target to $380. Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) shares surged by approximately 29% following the completion of an independent special committee review that contradicted EY’s findings. The Dow marked a 1.4% increase last week, posting a monthly gain of 7.5% for November. The S&P 500 also saw a 1.1% rise during the week. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
